name: Release Notes Writer
description: Turns the merged changes of a release into polished, audience-facing release notes with highlights, upgrade notes and a thank-you section, ready to publish to GitHub Releases or a blog.
author: ClaudeStudio Deployment Pack

inputs.label: Previous release ref / tag
inputs.help: Leave empty to use the latest tag.

steps.title: Collect merged changes
steps.prompt: Use git to gather the commits and merged PR titles between {{from_ref}} (default: latest tag if empty) and HEAD. Identify the user-meaningful changes: new features, notable improvements, fixes, and anything that changes behavior or requires action on upgrade.

steps.title: Write release notes
steps.prompt: Write release notes for {{product_name}} {{version}} aimed at {{audience}}. Lead with a short intro and 'Highlights' (the 3-5 most impactful changes phrased as benefits). Then 'What's New', 'Improvements', 'Bug Fixes', and — only if relevant — an 'Upgrade Notes' section calling out breaking changes and required migration steps. Close with a brief thanks to contributors. Keep it skimmable with bold lead-ins. Do not invent changes that are not supported by the git history.
